labels.name: Reviewing

labels.description: KSv2

body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.34-0 **Reproducible in staging?:** Y **Reproducible in production?:** Y **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** **Logs:** https://stackoverflow.com/c/expensify/questions/4856 **Expensify/Expensify Issue URL:** **Issue reported by:** @shawnborton **Slack conversation** (hyperlinked to channel name): [#Product](https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C03U7DCU4/p1773079166959519) ## Action Performed: ## Description: As more features are added to NewDot, the Left Hand Navigation (LHN) sections for Reports, Workspaces, and Account are becoming increasingly long. This causes many navigation items to fall out of view, requiring additional scrolling. To improve visibility and allow more items to fit on screen, the row height on desktop should be reduced from 52px to 44px. This change will make the navigation more compact while maintaining usability. For mobile, the current row height should remain unchanged to preserve comfortable tap targets. ## Steps to Reproduce: 1. Open New Expensify on desktop 2. Navigate to the LHN sections such as Reports, Workspaces, or Account 3. Observe that the list can become long and items fall out of view quickly ## Expected Result: Desktop LHN rows use a 44px height, allowing more items to appear on screen. Mobile LHN rows remain at 52px to maintain larger tap targets. ## Actual Result: LHN rows currently use 52px height on desktop, limiting the number of visible items and increasing scrolling. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: Select the officially supported platforms where the issue was reproduced: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @eVoloshchak

title: [$250] Refactor code to keep navigation handling in the UI components

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken. Auto assigns a BugZero manager.

body:
Coming from https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/82005#discussion_r2896647130 cc @jjcoffee # Problem There are functions in E/App that have a parameter called `shouldHandleNavigation`. This is a bad code smell because: 1. Navigation is not the job of lib/actions (it's a job of the view that is calling the action) 2. Functions should normally not have boolean parameters 3. Actions should only be reponsible for making API requests and handling the changes to Onyx data # Solution Refactor the code so that the navigation happens in the component view and not in the action files.
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @linhvovan29546
